sentences.target: Tu travailles avec ardeur ce matin.

translations.fr: Tu travailles avec ardeur ce matin.
translations.en: You’re working with real energy this morning.
translations.es: Estás trabajando con mucha energía esta mañana.
translations.de: Du arbeitest heute Morgen mit viel Elan.
translations.it: Stai lavorando con grande energia stamattina.
translations.ko: 오늘 아침에 정말 열심히 일하고 있네.
translations.zh-Hans: 你今天早上工作得很有干劲。
translations.ru: Ты сегодня утром работаешь с большим энтузиазмом.
translations.pt: Você está trabalhando com muita energia esta manhã.
translations.tr: Bu sabah büyük bir enerjiyle çalışıyorsun.
translations.vi: Sáng nay bạn làm việc rất hăng hái.
translations.ar: أنت تعمل بحماس كبير هذا الصباح.
translations.nl: Je werkt vanmorgen met veel energie.
translations.uk: Ти сьогодні вранці працюєш із великим запалом.
translations.hi: आज सुबह तुम बड़े जोश के साथ काम कर रहे हो.
translations.pl: Dziś rano pracujesz z dużym zapałem.
translations.el: Δουλεύεις με πολλή ενέργεια σήμερα το πρωί.
translations.nb: Du jobber med mye energi i dag tidlig.
translations.id: Pagi ini kamu bekerja dengan penuh energi.
translations.sv: Du jobbar med mycket energi i dag på morgonen.
translations.ro: Lucrezi cu multă energie dimineața asta.
translations.cs: Dnes ráno pracuješ s velkou energií.
translations.da: Her til morgen arbejder du med masser af energi.
translations.ja: 今朝はとてもエネルギッシュに働いているね。

tokens.explanation: Second-person singular subject pronoun; informal; grammatical subject of the verb.
Main verb in present indicative, 2nd person singular; agrees with the subject 'Tu'.
Preposition introducing the complement 'ardeur'.
Common noun (feminine singular); object of the preposition 'avec'.
Demonstrative determiner modifying 'matin'.
Common noun (masculine singular); forms a temporal complement with 'ce'.

translations.zh-Hans: 我今天很佩服你的热情。
translations.yue: 我今日好佩服你嘅幹勁。
translations.pt: Hoje eu admiro o seu entusiasmo.
translations.he: היום אני מעריך את ההתלהבות שלך.
translations.vi: Hôm nay tôi rất khâm phục nhiệt huyết của bạn.
translations.hi: आज मैं तुम्हारे जोश की प्रशंसा करता हूँ.
translations.nb: I dag beundrer jeg entusiasmen din.
translations.sv: I dag beundrar jag din entusiasm.
translations.da: I dag beundrer jeg din entusiasme.
translations.ja: 今日はあなたの情熱に感心しているよ。

tokens.explanation: Clitic subject pronoun elided before a vowel; 1st person singular.
Main verb in present indicative, 1st person singular.
Possessive determiner (2nd person singular); used before a feminine noun beginning with a vowel; modifies 'ardeur'.
Common noun (feminine singular); direct object of 'admire'.
Temporal adverb modifying the verb.

sentences.target: Il faut garder l'ardeur au travail.

translations.fr: Il faut garder l'ardeur au travail.
translations.en: We need to keep up our enthusiasm at work.
translations.es: Hay que mantener el entusiasmo en el trabajo.
translations.de: Wir müssen die Begeisterung bei der Arbeit aufrechterhalten.
translations.ko: 일할 때 열정을 계속 유지해야 해.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们需要在工作中保持热情。
translations.yue: 我哋要喺工作中保持幹勁。
translations.pt: Precisamos manter o entusiasmo no trabalho.
translations.vi: Chúng ta cần giữ vững nhiệt huyết trong công việc.
translations.ar: نحتاج إلى الحفاظ على الحماس في العمل.
translations.nl: We moeten het enthousiasme op het werk vasthouden.
translations.hu: Meg kell őriznünk a lelkesedést a munkában.
translations.hi: काम में हमें उत्साह बनाए रखना चाहिए.
translations.el: Πρέπει να διατηρήσουμε τον ενθουσιασμό στη δουλειά.
translations.nb: Vi må holde entusiasmen oppe på jobb.
translations.id: Kita perlu menjaga semangat di tempat kerja.
translations.sv: Vi behöver hålla entusiasmen uppe på jobbet.
translations.ro: Trebuie să ne menținem entuziasmul la muncă.
translations.cs: Musíme si udržet nadšení v práci.
translations.da: Vi skal holde gejsten oppe på arbejdet.
translations.ja: 仕事での熱意を保つ必要がある。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal pronoun serving as dummy subject of 'falloir'.
Impersonal verb 'falloir', present 3rd person singular; expresses necessity.
Infinitive verb; complement of 'faut'.
Definite article elided before a vowel; determiner for 'ardeur'.
Common noun (feminine singular); direct object of 'garder'.
Contraction of 'à + le'; preposition introducing the complement 'travail'.
Common noun (masculine singular); object of the preposition 'au'.

translations.en: We’re losing a bit of enthusiasm.
translations.es: Estamos perdiendo un poco de entusiasmo.
translations.de: Wir verlieren ein bisschen an Elan.
translations.it: Stiamo perdendo un po' di entusiasmo.
translations.pt: Estamos perdendo um pouco do entusiasmo.
translations.vi: Chúng ta đang mất dần chút nhiệt huyết.
translations.nl: We raken een beetje enthousiasme kwijt.
translations.hi: हम थोड़ा जोश खो रहे हैं.
translations.ja: 私たちは少しやる気を失いつつある。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite subject pronoun; takes 3rd person singular agreement.
Main verb in present indicative, 3rd person singular; agrees with 'On'.
Indefinite article (masculine singular) determining 'peu'.
Measure noun serving as the head of the partitive construction 'un peu de'.
Preposition 'de' elided before a vowel; introduces the complement 'ardeur'.
Common noun (feminine singular); complement of the preposition 'de'.

Il faut garder l'ardeur au travail.

We need to keep up our enthusiasm at work.
We’re losing a bit of enthusiasm.
